issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases beyond typical CI patterns.

scenarios.name: Lint+test+build+deploy pipeline with concurrency and main-branch guard
scenarios.rationale: Both include concurrency cancel-in-progress, cache: npm, needs ordering, artifact handoff, and main-only deploy guard; treatment adds retention-days and production environment.

scenarios.name: Postgres service container with health check for integration tests
scenarios.rationale: Both define a postgres service with env vars, pg_isready health check, and DATABASE_URL on localhost:5432; treatment also wires a Redis sidecar and explains the readiness gate.
